message:
feat(codegen): Add 5 maintainability helpers to mod_helper.zig

Added helper functions for common code generation patterns:
- listContains: Check if value is in compile-time list
- unwrapOptional: Safe optional unwrapping with defaults
- tryOrDefault: Try-catch with default values
- allocPrint: Formatted string allocation
- conditional: If-then-else expressions

All helpers use nextNameId() for unique block labels.
